booking_modal.title: Book Your Trip Items
booking_modal.success_desc: We have sent your plan to the relevant shops. Check status in My Bookings.

hero.title: What booking do you need?
hero.subtitle: Select your beauty service first and move directly to the booking step. We have designed it for fast mobile selection followed by shop comparison and reservation requests.
hero.welcome: Welcome {{name}}, please select a service today.

booking.title: Please select your desired beauty service
booking.description: Once you pick a category, you can start exploring reservations based on that service in the next step.

hair.label: Hair
hair.summary: Start booking everything from style changes to quick trims fastest here.

nail.label: Nail
nail.summary: Pick your desired mood and design, then move lightly to the booking step.

esthetic.label: Esthetic
esthetic.summary: Compare shops and book based on your skin condition and treatment goals.

waxing.label: Waxing
waxing.summary: Quickly find shops matching your area and schedule, leading into the booking flow.

makeup.label: Makeup
makeup.summary: Select a makeup service for your event date and start booking immediately.

lash.label: Lash
lash.summary: Connect directly to the menu for everything from natural extensions to volume styling.

selection.empty: Please select a category first. The start booking button will activate after selection.

footer.help: Not sure which service to pick?

today_beauty.title: Today's Beauty
today_beauty.subtitle: Discover the latest beauty trends and reviews.
today_beauty.empty_desc: Be the first to share your beauty experience!

beauty_explore.title: Explore Beauty
beauty_explore.subtitle: Find the perfect shop and service for you.

f1.title: Plant Cafe Seoul
f1.desc: 100% vegan cuisine made with fresh vegetables and healthy ingredients

f2.title: Gold Pig BBQ
f2.desc: The best samgyeopsal restaurant in Korea, selected by the Michelin Guide

f3.title: Jagalchi Fish Market
f3.desc: A hearty sashimi course where you can feel the freshness of the Busan sea

b1.title: Jenny House Cheongdam
b1.desc: Premium hair & makeup shop frequented by K-idols

b2.title: PPEUM Clinic Gangnam
b2.desc: The best value-for-money beauty clinic most visited by foreigners

e1.title: PSY Water Show 2024
e1.desc: PSY's cool and passionate performance to blow away the summer heat

e2.title: Nanta Show Myeongdong
e2.desc: A non-verbal performance combining traditional Korean rhythms with modern performance

fs1.title: Seoul Lantern Festival
fs1.desc: A feast of colorful and beautiful lanterns embroidering Gwanghwamun Square

fs2.title: Film Festival
fs2.desc: Experience world-class films at the heart of Busan's cinema district

tr1.title: KTX to Busan
tr1.desc: The fastest and most convenient way to travel from Seoul to Busan

planner.title: My Planner
planner.subtitle: Create your perfect trip itinerary.
planner.no_specific_filters: No additional filters for this category.

saved.title: Saved Items
saved.subtitle: View and manage your saved places and trip plans.
saved.summary_hint: Items are saved locally on this device.

places.title: Saved Places
places.desc: Check the places you've bookmarked while exploring.

plans.title: Saved Plans
plans.desc: View your current and previous trip itineraries.

empty.title: No plans yet
empty.desc: Start building your journey in the Planner.

recent.title: Recently Viewed
recent.desc: Places and plans you've checked out lately.

empty.title: No recent history
empty.desc: Items you view will appear here.
empty.fallback: History is not available on this device.

beauty_booking_link.title: View My Beauty Bookings
beauty_booking_link.desc: Check booking status and service details at a glance.

settings.title: My Settings
settings.subtitle: Check your account, language, partner status, and connected hubs here.

preferences.region_empty: No region info yet. Create a trip to see estimates.
preferences.region_hint: Based on your current planner draft.
preferences.style_empty: No style saved yet. Read-only until account preferences are linked.
preferences.interests_empty: Interests will appear here once you save items or create plans.

beauty_bookings.intent_booking_confirm_desc: Quick check of time and treatment.

hero.title: Beauty Booking Reviews First
hero.subtitle: Salon reviews, then food, travel, and more.

banner.title: kello Beauty Review ✨
banner.body: Compare quality, satisfaction, and revisit intent.

booking.label: Booking Support
booking.desc: Check recent bookings, issues, and next steps.

general.label: General Support
general.desc: Help center, community safety, and support paths.

emergency.label: Emergency / Interp
emergency.desc: Medical, Police, and Language support hub.

find_booking.a: Check the map in your booking card. Use Interpreter help if needed.

staff_talk.a: Use the Translation tool or Emergency help for immediate support.

change_time.a: Direct change not supported yet. Start from Booking Support for next steps.

cancel_refund.a: In-app refund not linked. Check Help Center for available paths.

write_review.a: Completed bookings can lead to reviews in My Community.

community_safety.a: Stop sharing info and move to a safe place. Use Police support if needed.

community_safety.label: Community Safety
community_safety.desc: Safety paths for meetups and community.

general.title: General Support
general.desc: Use this if you are not sure where to go.
general.report_notice: Direct issue tickets not supported. Use support paths for inquiries.

overview.label: Emergency Help
overview.desc: Main emergency page for Medical, Police, and Lost & Found.

interp.label: Interpreter Help
interp.booking_desc: Passes booking context to the interpreter path.

phrases.label: Emergency Phrases
phrases.desc: Show large Korean phrases to staff or drivers.
phrases.booking_desc: Phrases for booking, delays, and check-in.

emergency.title: Emergency Support
emergency.desc: My Support is a hub. Use these for specific urgent situations.
emergency.interpreter_notice: Some options may open external translation pages.
emergency.hub_notice: Choose the right detail page or use the Phrasebook for on-site help.

booking.title: Booking Support
booking.desc: Find the right support path based on recent bookings.

empty.title: No bookings to inquire about.
empty.desc: Check your plans or explore new places.

booking.context_desc: Maintain booking context between support and phrases.

interpreter_ui_v2.header_desc: Customer and staff speak in their own languages.

dashboard.beauty_bookings_desc: Check status and treatments at a glance.

interpreter_page.title: Real-time Interpreter Assistant
interpreter_page.subtitle: The tourist language is automatically set to the app language, and the staff language is fixed to Korean.
interpreter_page.onboarding: When the tourist inputs something, it's translated to Korean. When the staff inputs Korean, it's translated to the tourist's language.
interpreter_page.customer_recording: Recording tourist, tap again to stop
interpreter_page.staff_recording: Recording staff, tap again to stop
interpreter_page.customer_placeholder: Please enter what the tourist said.
interpreter_page.staff_placeholder: Please enter what the staff said in Korean.
interpreter_page.voice_supported_hint: Record by tapping the speak button or enter the text below.
interpreter_page.voice_not_supported_hint: Voice input is not supported in this browser. Please use text input.
interpreter_page.voice_unrecognized_error: Could not recognize voice. Please speak more clearly.
interpreter_page.voice_failed_error: Voice recognition failed. You can continue with text input.
interpreter_page.mic_unsupported_error: Cannot use microphone. Please check browser permissions or use text input.
interpreter_page.input_required_customer: Please enter the tourist's sentence first.
interpreter_page.input_required_staff: Please enter the staff's sentence first.
interpreter_page.translation_failed_error: A problem occurred during translation. Please try again later.
interpreter_page.empty_history_hint: The interpretation history will appear here once you enter the first sentence.
interpreter_page.replay_not_supported_hint: Voice playback is not supported in this browser.
interpreter_page.voice_too_short_error: Please speak a bit longer. Recognition is difficult if the voice is too short.

empty.title: No plans for today
empty.desc: Explore places to add to your schedule!
